expectations.evidence: Has Suggested Execution Order table at the end, not an overview table at the top
Tasks use Goal/Steps format — no narrative Description or Technical decisions block
Uses plain bullet-point acceptance criteria, not Given/When/Then scenarios
No Out of Scope sections on any task
Covers config, palette, context, FOUC, toggle, components, third-party, transitions, tests, QA
Uses Goal/Steps format without Description, Given/When/Then, or Out of Scope
